inputs.label: Target Amount
inputs.businessContext: The future value needed to be accumulated.

businessContext_i18n.en: The future value needed to be accumulated.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der zukünftige Wert, der angespart werden soll.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual interest rate earned on the sinking fund.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual interest rate earned on the sinking fund.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Biriktirme fonunda kazanılan yıllık faiz oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher Zinssatz, der auf den Tilgungsfonds gezahlt wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'intérêt annuel gagné sur le fonds d'amortissement.

inputs.label: Number of Years
inputs.businessContext: The time period over which to accumulate the target amount.

businessContext_i18n.en: The time period over which to accumulate the target amount.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Zeitraum, über den der Zielbetrag angespart werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Période de temps pour accumuler le montant cible.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Number of compounding periods per year (e.g., monthly = 12, quarterly = 4).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of compounding periods per year (e.g., monthly = 12, quarterly = 4).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık bileşik dönem sayısı (örneğin aylık = 12, üç aylık = 4).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Zinsperioden pro Jahr (z. B. monatlich = 12, vierteljährlich = 4).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de périodes de capitalisation par an (ex. : mensuel = 12, trimestriel = 4).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
